name: execute_tool
desc: Call any MCP tool by name. Use after discover_tools returns tool names. Pass the tool name and a JSON object of parameters. Example: execute_tool(tool_name='check_clashes', params_json='{\

parameters.name: tool_name
parameters.description: The tool name from discover_tools results — e.g. 'check_clashes', 'navigate_to_clash'

parameters.name: params_json
parameters.description: JSON object of parameters to pass — e.g. '{\
